canonical_definition: Uncertainty arising from inherent ambiguity in the task or data, leading to multiple valid outputs for a single input, which causes the model to distribute probability mass across these options.
papers: Reflective Agreement: Combining Self-Mixture of Agents with a Sequence Tagger for Robust Event Extraction
